ack.detail: MLLP TCP listener auto-generates HL7 ACK before processing: AA success, AE error, AR rejected.

field_map.note: XSLT selection.
FACIL selection; channelMap HospitalNumber also drives paths.
Capitalizes first character, lowercases remainder, removes spaces.
Given name plus optional middle name separated by space.
Direct.
YYYYMMDD converted to YYYY-MM-DD.
F and M retained; other values become U.
Direct.
Uses .4 as County and .5 as Postcode when .5 exists; otherwise output logic reverses intended values as coded.
H becomes HOME; all other values become CORR.
Primary patient transform uses PID-13.1 telephone, PID-14.1 mobile, and Internet-coded PID-13.3 email.
NKN and NSP map to ZX in primary transform.
Y maps IsDeceased to 1 and formats date of death YYYY-MM-DD; otherwise IsDeceased is 0.
GP code is first eight characters, defaulting to G9999981 when PD1-4.1 absent.
Direct.
Concatenated values within Risks.
Creates next-of-kin contacts except NK1-2.1=NS; maps name, address, telephone, mobile and NET-coded email.
Concatenated as value_component4 for normal patient path.
Formats YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM.
Clinic uses .1; Session uses .2 then falls back to .1.
Formats first name, surname and number as a display value.
Builds status such as Attended, Did Not Attend, Transferred, Departed, Arrived or Discharged by event and timing.
Only for clinic H2 and A05; normalizes listed procedure text.
Primary number is HospitalNumber from PID-2.1 where PID-2.5=PAS in the merge-specific branch.
Sends local identifier type and comments including ClinicCode.

yyyyMMddHHmmss.

evidence.claim: Accepts unauthenticated HTTP requests and builds an HL7v2 QRY^A19 from HTTP parameters.
evidence.location: Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | source HTTP Listener properties lines 10-49 and transformer JavaScript steps lines 52-83

evidence.claim: Sends the QRY over MLLP, requires a response, converts returned HL7 K21 to XML, and returns PatientList XML to the HTTP caller.
evidence.location: Bolton | PAS OUT | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Bolton/PAS OUT.xml | Send Q21 TCP Sender lines 147-195; Convert K21 to XML lines 386-421; response XSLT lines 556-620

notes: The outbound QRY template explicitly contains QRY^A19 and version 2.4. The response transformer is named Convert K21 to XML and converts the returned HL7 message without independently checking MSH-9.
